# Validation scores

<!-- Generated by `npm run docs:sync`. Do not hand-edit — edit tools/docs-sync.ts or tools/generator.ts (case descriptions) instead. -->

To generate suite metrics, run `npm run score:suite` then `npm run docs:sync`. **How scores are computed:** [SCORING.md](./SCORING.md).

## Summary

| Metric | Standard (0) | Edge (1) | All (1) |
|--------|---------------|-----------|----------|
| XML schema pass | 0 / 0 | 1 / 1 | **1 / 1** |
| Avg **visual (layout-based)** | — | 63.76% | **63.76%** |
| Avg raw layout (pre-guards) | — | 63.76% | **63.76%** |
| Avg pixel match (tripwire, unscored) | — | 53.00% | **53.00%** |
| Avg engine score | — | 72.99 | **72.99** |
| Avg compile | — | — | **85.0 ms** |
| Identity-pair calibration (full 36) | — | — | **mean 96.34% / min 68.53%** |

Tables below use the **layout-based visual** score; misaligned px is the raw pixel tripwire.

## Related
